title: Adversarial Pragmatics for AI Safety Evaluation: A Benchmark for Instruction Conflict, Embedded Commands, and Policy Ambiguity

text.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

official_repository.paper_link_evidence: The immutable v2 TeX source names this repository in sections/10-code-data-availability.tex.
official_repository.commit_relation: This commit is 32 minutes 44 seconds after the arXiv v2 update. It only changes arXiv font-bundle packaging and related documentation relative to its parent; the parent predates v2 by 3 hours 10 minutes. The pinned archive is therefore timing-appropriate for correspondence auditing, but not proof of the exact private pilot state.
official_repository.archive_integrity: ZIP CRC verification passed. The archive contains the 18-row seed item CSV, validator, annotation/rater materials, local runner, judge-validation and diagnostic scripts, 54-row sanitized evidence, aggregate summaries, and synthetic development-pass files. Raw model-output bundles are not released.
official_repository.acquisition_checks: scripts/validate_items.py benchmark/items/seed-items.csv passed. The --strict-pairs mode rejected P008 because its two diagnostic rows intentionally have mixed phenomenon labels; the paper excludes P008 from strict-pair scoring. All four JSON files parsed. CSV inspection found 18 seed rows, 54 sanitized evidence rows, 3 model-summary rows, and 9 pair-summary rows.

verification.pdfinfo_title: Adversarial Pragmatics for AI Safety Evaluation: A Benchmark for Instruction Conflict, Embedded Commands, and Policy Ambiguity
verification.text_inspection: Non-empty extraction inspected from title and abstract through the taxonomy, pilot design and results, code/data availability, supplementary local-pilot tables, LLM-judge validation, representative adjudications, and final development-pass material. All 28 page-break characters are present and no UTF-8 replacement characters were found.
verification.source_archive_integrity: Archive listed successfully; 35 members include main.tex, supplement.tex, section TeX files, bibliography, fonts, and figure PDFs.

review_boundary: This record establishes immutable-v2 acquisition, successful full-text extraction, and timing-aware preservation and basic integrity inspection of the official release. It is not a deep review and does not establish independent expert validity, annotation reliability, judge robustness, model safety differences, benchmark realism, professional-work validity, production fitness, or deployment readiness.
